copy.text: Hire and pay anyone in the world — with the compliance, reliability, and local expertise that only owned infrastructure delivers.

copy.heading: One system of record. Every employment need.

slots.name: list
slots.role: list — accordion items w/ deep-accent active state

copy.label: Employer of Record (EOR)
copy.title: Employer of Record (EOR)
copy.text: Need to hire anyone, anywhere? We handle the employment contract, taxes, benefits, and compliance — onboarded in hours, not months.

copy.label: Global Payroll
copy.title: Global Payroll
copy.text: Accurate, compliant payroll in every country you operate. Run by our in-house teams, no partner network.

copy.label: Contractor of Record (COR)
copy.title: Contractor of Record (COR)
copy.text: Engage international contractors compliantly. Contracts, payments, and risk — all handled by our experts.

copy.label: Contractor Management
copy.title: Contractor Management
copy.text: Engage contractors compliantly, anywhere — and convert them to FTEs before misclassification risk becomes a legal problem.

copy.label: Professional Employer Organization (PEO)
copy.title: Professional Employer Organization (PEO)
copy.text: US hiring without the admin burden. Payroll, taxes, benefits, all taken care of.

slots.name: media
slots.role: media — product UI collage (profile card + task list)

slots.name: body
slots.role: body — supporting copy w/ compliance proof terms

copy.text: We have our own legal experts, our own payroll specialists, and our own compliance teams in every market we operate in. And because it's all ours, everything lives in one place: every employment record, contract, compliance document, and payroll engine run accurate, current, audit-ready, SOC 2 Type 2 compliant, and ISO 27001 certified.
copy.body: We have our own legal experts, our own payroll specialists, and our own compliance teams in every market we operate in. And because it's all ours, everything lives in one place: every employment record, contract, compliance document, and payroll engine run accurate, current, audit-ready, SOC 2 Type 2 compliant, and ISO 27001 certified.

copy.heading: Hiring internationally, converting contractors, or consolidating payroll? Talk to our team.

treatments.note: rounded inner panel (~20px); soft green radial glow at lower edge (grounding section-04)

slots.name: cards
slots.role: cards — white cards w/ navy media wells

copy.heading: Deploy AI agents on real employment data
copy.text: Remote MCP gives any AI agent a live, secure connection to payroll, contracts, compliance data, and org structure — no API keys, no exports, no custom integrations needed.

copy.heading: Plug Remote into your stack
copy.text: Keep the HR tools your team already uses. Remote runs the payroll and compliance underneath, natively integrated with Workday, HiBob, BambooHR, Personio, and more.

copy.heading: Build on top of ours
copy.text: Remote is API-first by design. Use our REST API, webhooks, and CLI to build custom workflows, embed global employment into your own product, or extend Remote however your business needs.

slots.name: heading
slots.role: heading — centered header stack ('THE GLOBAL PAYROLL BACKBONE')

copy.heading: The world's best teams run on Remote

copy.text: Remote is the infrastructure leading HR platforms trust to deliver global payroll, EOR, and contractor management to their customers.

slots.name: heading
slots.role: heading — centered header ('A word from our customers')

slots.name: cards
slots.role: cards — quote cards w/ avatars + company marks

copy.heading: Luke McKinlay, VP of Finance
copy.text: If we had to manage and coordinate everything in-house, it would cost us well over $500,000 more each year. Remote not only eliminates that financial strain but also takes the operational burden off our plate, allowing us to focus on growing our business with confidence and efficiency.
copy.name: Luke McKinlay

copy.heading: Marisol Jiménez, Head of People
copy.text: We run monthly, semi-monthly and hourly payroll in multiple different currencies around the world and our Finance Manager has full visibility in a single platform. With Remote, you can make it happen.
copy.name: Marisol Jiménez

copy.heading: Maria Shkaruppa, Senior Global Mobility and Remote Hiring Manager
copy.text: We see Remote as a leading and trusted partner in this space. The expert support they provide in local payroll, tax compliance, and HR operations has streamlined our processes and created more opportunities for growth and success on a global scale.
copy.name: Maria Shkaruppa
copy.personRole: Senior Global Mobility and Remote Hiring Manager

slots.name: action
slots.role: action — outlined pill ('Hear from our customers')

copy.heading: The #1 global HR platform as voted by you

slots.name: ratings
slots.role: ratings — review-platform rating chips (glyph + stars + score)

copy.heading: Global employment is hard. We built the infrastructure to do it right.

copy.text: Every country has different laws, tax codes, payroll rules, and compliance requirements. Remote handles the hard stuff — with in-house payroll teams, local legal experts, and owned entities in every market we operate in.
copy.body: Every country has different laws, tax codes, payroll rules, and compliance requirements. Remote handles the hard stuff — with in-house payroll teams, local legal experts, and owned entities in every market we operate in.
